title: codereview-pass1: CCP-15.8.3 pseudocode still references outdated fnv1a32 in some cross-refs; ensure all point to crc32_ieee and add line ref to schc.c:90
close_reason: Fixed all cross-refs to use crc32_ieee consistently per lichen/subsys/schc/schc.c:90 and spec/02a-coordinated-capacity.md:41; added line refs per guideline; updated both spec files. No P0-P2 remain for this pass.
